purpose: Contacts-page UI for adding a contact by npub: an 'Add Contact' button on pages/contacts.tsx opens AddContactModal, which collects a typed or QR-scanned npub, calls the S1 addContactByNpub seam, maps its error codes to translated Alert copy, and on success bumps the page's contactsRevision so the newly-added (or reactivated) contact appears in the list without a reload.

public_api.name: AddContactModal
public_api.signature: AddContactModal(props: { isOpen: boolean; onClose: () => void; onSuccess: () => void }): JSX.Element
public_api.description: Modal component modeled on InviteMemberModal. Renders an npub Input + NpubQrButton/NpubQrModal + submit Button. On submit, calls addContactByNpub(npubInput.trim(), ownPubkeyHex) where ownPubkeyHex comes from useNostrIdentity(). On ok:true, sets a local success state, clears the input, calls onSuccess() (contacts-page bumps contactsRevision), then after ~1500ms clears success and calls onClose() — mirroring InviteMemberModal's success-timeout pattern. On ok:false, renders an error Alert (data-testid=add-contact-error) mapped from result.error via a getErrorMessage switch and keeps the modal open. Guards against double-submit (isLoading disables submit; submit is also disabled when input is empty or success is true).

dependencies_forbidden: app/src/lib/nostrKeys.ts (internal helpers beyond what contacts.ts already re-exports via addContactByNpub's contract)
direct localStorage / readStoredContacts / writeStoredContacts access from the modal or the page
